mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `database` (datasource_id, database_name, display_name, description) VALUES (#{datasourceId}, #{databaseName}, #{displayName}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `database` WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} ORDER BY database_name
SELECT * FROM `database` WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND database_name = #{databaseName}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `database` (datasource_id, database_name, display_name, description) VALUES
(#{item.datasourceId}, #{item.databaseName}, #{item.displayName}, #{item.description})
